monitoring: Real-time threat monitoring • 3D analytics • Proactive alerts
multimodal:
Multimodal AI: video, audio, OCR, connection graph. 
Results in 1-2 minutes.
vstavte-ss: Paste the link to TikTok / Instagram / YouTube
ai-media-w:
AI Media Watch analyzes video in 3 stages: 1) Extract key frames, audio and text (OCR). 
2) Detection of visual markers of casinos/pyramids (YOLO), speech transcription (Whisper), search for prohibited phrases (NLP). 
3) Providing a verdict and explaining the risk.
ezhednevno:
Every day, thousands of users fall for the tricks of scammers on social networks: fake casinos, financial pyramids, referral schemes. 
Our AI helps identify such threats before they cause harm.
investirui: “Invest 1000, get 10,000” is a classic Ponzi scheme.
ispolzuite: Use our AI to check your videos
kak-zashit: How to protect yourself from fraud?
obeshayut-: They promise easy winnings, but in reality they withdraw money.
zarabotok-: Earning money only by attracting new victims without a real product.
